programmes.show_description: Grave Discoveries. Forensic scientists re-evaluate unsolved crimes and apply new methods to solving them. S3, Ep10
Bad Medicine. A thought-provoking look at how drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. S3, Ep12
Driven To The Edge. After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her. S2, Ep7
Snatched On Camera. 19-year-old student Katie Poirier vanishes while working the graveyard shift at a gas station. CCTV footage reveals an answer - but leaves a community in fear. S2, Ep8

Faces of Tragedy. Forensic sculptors can place a face on an unidentified corpse by recreating a victim's likeness, often leading to a name. S1, Ep8
Without a Trace. A motel clerk disappears, leaving behind a trail of blood. Investigators have their suspect, but without a victim, what can they charge him with? S1, Ep9
Dangerous Case. In the late '70s, a terrorist group is suspected of setting off bombs in major US cities. Their goal: to bring attention to the Puerto Rican independence movement. S7, Ep2
The Great Philby Mob War. Three armed men attack a man and flee the scene. Authorities are unable to identify the assailants but are convinced it was the work of the Mafia. S7, Ep3
Scott Peterson. When Laci Peterson went missing, her husband claimed he last saw her before he went fishing - but his secret mistress exposed his lies. Experts examine his behaviour. S3, Ep10
True Crime. Crime writers know as much about crime as any crime-fighter - or criminal. They can provide as near a first-person account of a murder as is possible. S3, Ep14
Tainted Blood. Police rely on a drop of blood to determine a missing person's fate. Plus, when a woman is hit by a train, is a killer covering his tracks? S6, Ep12
Proof of Innocence. A man is convicted of the murder of a little girl snatched during a game of hide-and-seek. After a 20-year campaign, could new DNA evidence set him free? S6, Ep13
Sins of the Father. The wife of a beloved Methodist minister from Pennsylvania dies in a freak automobile accident. But was is it really an accident or was there foul play? S4, Ep6
Loyalty, Lies, and Loss. A promising young lawyer at Scott Rothstein's law firm is murdered. Investigation into Rothstein reveals a complex Ponzi scheme, duping unwary victims. S2, Ep1
Loved to Death. When a doctor comes home on Valentine's Day to surprise his wife, he instead finds her dead. But as Aphrodite finds out, nothing in this case is what it seems. S3, Ep8
Good People, Badlands. Montana is shocked when mother Susan Casey goes missing after a date. Detectives realize that three men are in her life, any one of whom might be guilty. S4, Ep3
Every Move She Makes. A woman in a small town is the target of a terrifying and insidious stalker. When she goes missing, police must prove she was killed- without a body. S5, Ep10
Broken Commandments. A parishioner is shot to death while working in the office of her church in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Was she killed at random? S5, Ep4
Killers On The Run. The discovery of a murdered schoolgirl leads to an international manhunt, and the dramatic arrest of her father and stepmother on an airport runway. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: After a store robbery turns into abduction, Texas Ranger Jim Holland tracks a suspect to a motel and presses for the missing owner's location. S1, Ep6
Tracie Andrews & Mike Gifford-Hull. What exposed Tracie Andrews' lie that a road rage attack killed her lover? Mike Gifford-Hull's TV plea for his missing wife Farsi hides the truth. S2, Ep2
Presumed Dead. Three cases illustrating the extreme measures investigators take to catch a killer when a missing person is presumed dead but no body can be found. S4, Ep6
Natural Witness. Features investigations in which natural clues, including insect bites, cat hair and a rare form of bacteria helped forensic scientists solve murders. S4, Ep4
Blood Bath. Mum-of-two Nikki Whitehead is brutally murdered in her own home. Police suspect she may have known her killer. Polygraphs and CCTV footage help reveal the horrific truth. S2, Ep9
The Vanishing Babysitter. 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her home, but police find a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction. S2, Ep10

Burning Evidence. With only charred remains left of the victim, forensic detectives have to sift carefully through this scanty evidence to solve a perplexing murder. S1, Ep10
Short Fuse. The occurrence of letter-bombing is becoming increasingly more frequent, but the crime lab is the place where the scientists pursue the bombers. S1, Ep11
The Shootist. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep4
Rebellion in Paradise. A detailed look and investigation into Macheteros, a clandestine Puerto Rican liberation movement accused of numerous acts of brutal terror. S7, Ep5

programmes.show_name: Boris Johnson: A Faking It Special
programmes.show_description: Experts analyse the former Prime Minister's colourful past and complicated relationship with the truth. Was his career littered with lies?
Terror For Sale. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep6
Death of a Diplomat. The dignity of Embassy Row is shattered as a bomb strapped to the undercarriage of a Chevelle kills a former Chilean ambassador to the US and his wife. S7, Ep7
Deadly Payout. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep8
Chacey Poynter. When firefighter Bob Poynter is killed, no-one appears more devastated than his young wife, Chacey. But soon detectives discover a web of lies. S3, Ep5
Uloma Curry-Walker. Within weeks of their wedding, a debt-ridden wife recruits a team of teenagers to help her get her hands on her husband's life insurance policy. S3, Ep9
Jesse Matthew. In Virginia, 2009, student Morgan Harrington vanished. Her body is found, but no culprit is identified until five years later, when another student goes missing. S1, Ep4
Pate. On a stormy night in Memphis, Micah Rine Pate mysteriously disappears, leaving behind unanswered questions and a husband whose story just doesn't add up. S4, Ep8
Ben Lacomba. When Sarah Wellgreen suddenly disappears, detectives desperately search for her. But after discovering no evidence, they investigate closer to home. S3, Ep10
Trimaan Dhillon. When Alice Ruggles is found dead in her flat, detectives uncover a tale of obsession. Police must distinguish truth from lies to solve this case. S5, Ep9
Kohlhepp. Todd Kohlhepp hides a deeply disturbing history of crime. When police find a woman held captive and her boyfriend missing, they unravel the truth. S4, Ep6
Three Times A Killer. When Debra marries Randy, his violent and cruel side takes over. Eventually, she manages to escape, but the next woman isn't so lucky. S9, Ep12
Shafelia Ahmed & Gordon Wardell. 17-year old Shafelia's disappearance was a mystery - until her sister is arrested for a robbery. Carol Wardell vanished and her husband left tied-up. S2, Ep3
